response.justification: Bogdan is a highly experienced Staff Software Engineer with a robust background in TypeScript, cloud infrastructure, and system architecture, holding a BS in Computer Science from MIT. However, he falls significantly short of the core requirement for 8+ years of experience specifically building AI-driven solutions, as his exposure to AI agents and MCP appears to be very recent. Furthermore, he lacks listed experience with Python, Vector Databases, and RAG architectures, which are essential for this GenAI role.
strengths: Extensive software engineering experience, including Staff-level roles and deep TypeScript expertise.
Recent exposure to relevant GenAI technologies, including Model Context Protocol (MCP) and agentic workflows.
Solid foundation in cloud infrastructure (AWS) and a proven track record of mentoring and leading technical workshops.
concerns: Fails to meet the strict requirement of 8+ years of experience building production-grade AI solutions.
No listed experience with Python, Vector Databases, or Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) architectures.
AI experience appears extremely recent (starting April 2025), which does not align with the expectations for a Staff-level AI role.
